outcomes: Determine soil pH metrics using electrochemical probes and diagnose specific cation-exchange capacity trends
Analyze structural nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium pathways to correct crop nutritional deficiencies
Design automated closed-loop drip networks utilizing localized soil-moisture sensor loops and solar pumps
Manage microclimatic telemetry matrices (humidity, thermal variations, CO2 values) inside standard greenhouse systems
Perform localized terrestrial or aquatic population surveys using quadrant sampling models and biotic diversity indexes
Draft elementary Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) blueprints evaluating local infrastructural interventions
Calculate structural load sizing parameters and efficiency configurations for off-grid solar photovoltaic layouts
Design and construct scalable anaerobic bio-digester setups to convert agricultural waste products into fuel sources

sub_strands.sub_strand: Food Preservation Biochemistry and Pathogen Vectors
outcomes: Examine underlying chemical profiles governing enzyme-driven food spoilage, lipid oxidation, and cellular fermentation
Cultivate and isolate microscopic foodborne fungal or bacterial pathogens using sterile agar medium plating configurations
